default.text: ⟦⟦ T̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃ m̃ãĩñt̃ãĩñs̃ ã ñõt̃ãb̃l̃ẽ d̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ t̃h̃r̃õũg̃h̃õũt̃. ⟧⟧

high_density.text: ⟦⟦ H̃ĩg̃h̃ d̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃ l̃ĩm̃ĩt̃ r̃ẽc̃õṽẽr̃ỹ t̃ĩm̃ẽ. ⟧⟧

stream_focus.text: ⟦⟦ C̃õñt̃ĩñũõũs̃ f̃l̃õw̃ p̃ãt̃t̃ẽr̃ñs̃ d̃ẽf̃ĩñẽ t̃h̃ẽ c̃h̃ãr̃t̃'s̃ p̃ãc̃ĩñg̃. ⟧⟧

variable_density.text: ⟦⟦ D̃ẽñs̃ĩt̃ỹ ṽãr̃ĩẽs̃ b̃ẽt̃w̃ẽẽñ s̃ẽc̃t̃ĩõñs̃,̃ c̃r̃ẽãt̃ĩñg̃ s̃h̃ĩf̃t̃ĩñg̃ p̃r̃ẽs̃s̃ũr̃ẽ. ⟧⟧
